overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a walk along a desert highway in Sandy Shores, transitioning from open road to a rural gas station. The clip features clear morning lighting, passing vehicles including a tractor and quad bike, and ends with exploration of Sandy's Gas Station.

events.description: advertising blimp becomes visible in the sky
speed limit 50 sign comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the desert highway

entered.detail: wooden power pole with multiple cross arms
multiple high-tension wires stretching across the scene
steep dirt and rock slope alongside the highway
tall lattice tower with antennas visible in the distance
white rectangular sign with black text reading SPEED LIMIT 50

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway with rocky terrain on the right and power lines running parallel to the road. The camera walks forward along the asphalt shoulder, passing a speed limit sign while an advertising blimp floats in the clear morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with vehicle traffic approaching intersection

events.description: large green tractor passes by on the left side of the road
person on red quad bike drives past in the distance
black SUV passes through the upcoming intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as various vehicles pass by on the road

notable_agents.action: green tractor with large yellow wheels driving past on the road
red quad bike driving away down the highway

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open highway, the camera encounters light traffic including a large green tractor passing close by and a red quad bike in the distance. The rocky terrain gives way to flatter desert scrub as the camera approaches an intersection where an SUV passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural intersection with welcome sign and gas station approach

events.description: turns right at the intersection toward the Sandy Shores sign
approaches and passes the Welcome to Sandy Shores wooden sign

agents.ego_description: turns right at the intersection and walks toward the Sandy Shores welcome sign and gas station

entered.detail: large turquoise wooden sign reading Welcome to SANDY SHORES We Have Liquor POP 3010
yellow gas station canopy visible in the distance
tall palm trees in circular planters near the gas station

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, leaving the main highway behind. It approaches and passes the iconic Welcome to Sandy Shores sign, with the yellow canopy of Sandy's Gas Station and palm trees becoming visible ahead against the backdrop of distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural gas station forecourt with canopy and pumps

events.description: enters the Sandy's Gas Station forecourt under the yellow canopy
walks around the gas station building examining the pumps and exterior

agents.ego_description: walking around the gas station forecourt, examining the pumps, parked car, and building exterior

notable_agents.action: person in blue clothing standing near the gas station entrance

entered.detail: white building with yellow trim and graffiti on the side wall
vintage style gas pumps under the yellow canopy
circular stone wall planter with large palm tree
dark colored sedan parked near the gas pumps

segments.scene_description: Entering the gas station forecourt, the camera explores the area under the yellow Sandy's Gas Station canopy. The scene includes gas pumps, a parked car, and the main building with visible graffiti. A person stands near the entrance as the camera circles the stone planters and palm trees, examining the rural gas station details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desert highway that gradually transitions into the detailed environment of a rural gas station. It begins by walking along an asphalt shoulder past rocky terrain and power lines, with an advertising blimp drifting through the clear morning sky. As the camera continues forward, the rocky landscape shifts to flatter desert scrub and the road becomes busier with a passing green tractor and a distant red quad bike. The scene then turns right at an intersection, passing the Welcome to Sandy Shores sign as the yellow canopy of a gas station and distant mountains emerge on the horizon. Finally, the camera enters the gas station forecourt, moving beneath the yellow canopy to explore the gas pumps, graffiti-covered walls, and palm trees.
